PreToolUse.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $toolName = $input.toolName; $filePath = $input.toolInput.file_path; if ($toolName -in @('edit','create') -and $filePath -like '*.sol') { $newContent = $input.toolInput.new_str; if ($newContent -and $newContent -match 'Callback\s*\(') { @{systemMessage='🔐 CALLBACK GÜVENLİĞİ: msg.sender doğrulaması (tload ile expected address check) zorunludur!'} | ConvertTo-Json } }"
